# generate-docs

**Description:** Generate markdown documentation from extracted component and token metadata.

## Rules
- Component docs include title, description, props table, and usage example.
- Generate token docs for colors, spacing, and typography.
- Keep generated files and machine-readable artifacts in stable locations.
- Preserve deterministic ordering for repeatable diffs.
